---
title: "ML and Game Theory"
description: "AlphaZero, CFR, multi-agent RL, GANs as games, adversarial robustness."
listing:
  contents: "*/index.qmd"
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  fields: [title, description, date, categories]
---

::: {.topic-card-label}
60 TUTORIALS
:::

# ML and Game Theory

AlphaZero, CFR, multi-agent RL, GANs as games, adversarial robustness.
